ddls:
CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "local_authority_code" TEXT /* Code of the local authority (2019) */,
  "local_authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority (2019) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the local authority belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the local authority */,
  "urban_rural_status" TEXT /* Urban or rural status of the local authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_deprivation_data" (
  "health_deprivation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health deprivation data point */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local authority the data belongs to */,
  "average_rank" REAL /* Average rank of health deprivation and disability */,
  "rank_of_average_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of average rank of health deprivation and disability */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of health deprivation and disability */,
  "rank_of_average_score" INTEGER /* Rank of average score of health deprivation and disability */,
  "proportion_of_lsoas_in_most_deprived_10%" REAL /* Proportion of LSOAs in the most deprived 10% nationally */,
  "rank_of_proportion_of_lsoas_in_most_deprived_10%" INTEGER /* Rank of proportion of LSOAs in the most deprived 10% nationally */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period the data covers (e.g., 2019-2020) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_deprivation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_deprivation_data_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "socioeconomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic data point */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local authority the data belongs to */,
  "income_deprivation" REAL /* Income deprivation score */,
  "employment_deprivation" REAL /* Employment deprivation score */,
  "education_deprivation" REAL /* Education deprivation score */,
  "health_deprivation" REAL /* Health deprivation score */,
  "crime_deprivation" REAL /* Crime deprivation score */,
  "barriers_to_housing_and_services_deprivation" REAL /* Barriers to housing and services deprivation score */,
  "living_environment_deprivation" REAL /* Living environment deprivation score */,
  "child_poverty_rate" REAL /* Child poverty rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socioeconomic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "health_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health intervention */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local authority the intervention belongs to */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the health intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the health intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the health intervention */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the health intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the health intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_programs" (
  "social_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social program */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local authority the program belongs to */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the social program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the social program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the social program */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the social program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the social program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_programs_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, academic, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, analyst) */,
  "organisation" TEXT /* Organisation the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_sections" (
  "report_section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report section */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the report section */,
  "section_content" TEXT /* Content of the report section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., text, chart, table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sections_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "report_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report section the chart belongs to */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., bar, line, pie) */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the chart */,
  "chart_title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_report_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_section_id") REFERENCES report_sections ("report_section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "report_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report section the table belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "table_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the table */,
  "table_type" TEXT /* Type of table (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_report_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_section_id") REFERENCES report_sections ("report_section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "data_export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
